Starknet Homepage

1,000,000 pixels
0.00001 ETH per pixel
Own a piece of Starknet History

This project pays homage to the infamous Million Dollar Homepage.

The images on this platform are not moderated and are presented in a true decentralized fashion, meaning there is no content filter. As a result, the responsibility for the images lies solely with the NFTs respective owners.

Author: Daniel Bejarano | GitHub | Twitter

Built with Material-UI and Starknet-React and powered by Starknet
